case_title: SUZANNE WOODARD VS. SOFI WEALTH, LLC

docket_entries.description: REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO ORDER FILED ON 8/4/2025. (SEE MANAGER FOR ORDER.)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOODARD, SUZANNE
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-25-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SOFI WEALTH, LLC
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOODARD, SUZANNE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY WOODARD, SUZANNE AS TO DEFENDANT SOFI WEALTH, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-19-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOODARD, SUZANNE AS TO DEFENDANT SOFI WEALTH, LLC

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF SUZANNE WOODARD IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT SOFI WEALTH, LLC IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED THE CASE HAS SETTLED AND IS REQUESTING A DISMISSAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CAROLYN GOLD; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
